name: MapleRoute Distribution Hub - Canada
shortDescription: A major Canadian distribution center positioned near Pearson Airport for rapid air-cargo integration and national ground transport.
description:
MapleRoute supports multi-channel fulfillment, including retail replenishment, e-commerce, and B2B distribution. With cold-chain capabilities, bilingual operations, and integrated customs brokerage, the center handles domestic and international freight efficiently. Its scalable infrastructure accommodates peak-season surges and large SKU assortments, making it a key logistics node for Canadian operations.

Working Hours (EST):
Mon-Fri: 06:00-20:00
Sat: 08:00-16:00
Sun: Closed
